hook: Zero trust assumes every request is untrusted until identity and context are verified.
cta: Enforce continuous verification with device posture and least-privilege policies.

storyboardBeats.objective: Contrast perimeter trust models with identity-aware access.
User and device identity are collected before access decisions.
Policy engine evaluates context signals against required trust level.
Micro-segmentation limits lateral movement after initial access.
Session trust is re-evaluated as context changes during the work session.

narrationPlaceholders.scriptIntent: Contrast perimeter trust models with identity-aware access.

transitionToNext.rationale: Identity-aware access policies gate how OAuth tokens establish application sessions.
